parameters.query:
INSERT INTO objection_tracker.sources (source_name, source_type, fetch_method, enabled)
VALUES ('{{ $json.source_name }}', '{{ $json.source_type }}', 'webhook', true)
ON CONFLICT (source_name) DO UPDATE SET
  last_fetched_at = NOW(),
  enabled = true
RETURNING id;

INSERT INTO objection_tracker.events (
  source_id,
  external_id,
  raw_text,
  source_url,
  source_author,
  source_date,
  meta
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.source_id }}',
  '{{ $json.external_id }}',
  '{{ $json.raw_text.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.source_url ? "'" + $json.source_url + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.source_author ? "'" + $json.source_author.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.source_date }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.meta).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (source_id, external_id) DO UPDATE SET
  raw_text = EXCLUDED.raw_text,
  source_url = EXCLUDED.source_url,
  source_author = EXCLUDED.source_author,
  source_date = EXCLUDED.source_date,
  meta = EXCLUDED.meta,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id;

UPDATE objection_tracker.events
SET
  classification = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.classification).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  processed_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ $json.event_id }}';

-- Insert each objection as a pattern
{{ $json.classification.objections.map((obj, i) => `
INSERT INTO objection_tracker.patterns (
  source_id,
  category,
  summary,
  verbatim_quote,
  severity,
  sentiment,
  contributing_events,
  occurrence_count,
  first_seen,
  last_seen
) VALUES (
  '${$json.source_id}',
  '${obj.category || 'other'}',
  '${(obj.summary || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
  '${(obj.verbatim || '').replace(/'/g, "''")}',
  '${obj.severity || 'medium'}',
  '${obj.sentiment || 'negative'}',
  ARRAY['${$json.event_id}']::uuid[],
  1,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (source_id, category, summary) DO UPDATE SET
  occurrence_count = objection_tracker.patterns.occurrence_count + 1,
  last_seen = NOW(),
  contributing_events = array_append(objection_tracker.patterns.contributing_events, '${$json.event_id}'::uuid)
RETURNING id;
`).join('') }}

INSERT INTO control_plane.signals (
  signal_type,
  source_system,
  payload,
  priority,
  metadata
) VALUES (
  'objection',
  'objection_tracker',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({
    source_name: $json.source_name,
    category: $json.classification.objections[0]?.category || "other",
    summary: $json.classification.objections[0]?.summary || "Objection detected",
    severity: $json.classification.objections[0]?.severity || "medium",
    event_id: $json.event_id,
    raw_text_preview: $json.raw_text.substring(0, 200)
  }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  CASE
    WHEN '{{ $json.classification.objections[0]?.severity || "medium" }}' = 'high' THEN 1
    WHEN '{{ $json.classification.objections[0]?.severity || "medium" }}' = 'medium' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.meta || {}).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
);
